steps.title: Evaluate P(0) at the start of the survey
steps.content: Since $t = 0$ means the survey began (by definition), substitute $t = 0$ into the function: $$P(0) = 2,400(1.03)^0 = 2,400 \cdot 1 = 2,400$$

steps.title: Interpret the meaning
steps.content: At the start of the survey ($t = 0$), the function gives 2,400, which represents the estimated number of shorebirds in the area when the survey began. B is correct.
